rag_rules: Assume statements must be placed in component types, not implementations, to avoid parsing errors
AGREE contracts are scoped to annex blocks within AADL packages and must follow valid syntax for component types
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics pointing to invalid AGREE syntax should be resolved by moving clauses to correct component type scopes
Repair actions must preserve unrelated architecture and only modify the specific diagnostic location
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks and must be placed in valid AADL component type or implementation contexts
anti_patterns: Placing assume statements in component implementations instead of component types will cause parsing failures
irrelevant_topics: AADL package structure and empty package diagnostics
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
Implementation-level data routing and execution constraints
